one_line_summary: An exceptional, production-ready submission that flawlessly implements all requirements with robust concurrency and excellent documentation.
strengths: Used Redis Lua scripts perfectly to guarantee atomicity and avoid retry loops.
Used anyio.to_thread in ASGI middleware to prevent blocking the async event loop.
Comprehensive test suite including Hypothesis property testing and multithreaded concurrency tests.
weaknesses: None observed; the implementation meets or exceeds all evaluation criteria.
